strengths: 15+ years of hands-on engineering across software, hardware, and infrastructure — exceeding minimum experience requirement with deep full-stack fluency.
Proven AI-agent infrastructure contributions at re:cinq and open-source AI-adjacent tooling (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts) demonstrating builder fluency in AI-powered systems.
Entrepreneurial track record founding and sustaining GISCollective for nearly a decade, with real-world adoption by NGOs and integration into global environmental mapping.
concerns: No explicit Master’s or PhD in AI-related field — though practical AI product experience compensates for this gap.
German language proficiency is basic, potentially limiting direct customer engagement in German-speaking markets.
Current role at re:cinq (April 2025–present) is listed as future-dated, raising minor timeline ambiguity.
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with demonstrable, hands-on leadership across cloud, AI-agent infrastructure, and distributed systems, while his founding of GISCollective and contributions to AI-adjacent tooling reflect the entrepreneurial spirit and product-building fluency the role demands — his ability to ship complex, real-world platforms using modern and niche tech stacks positions him as a rare, self-driven innovator who can drive AI strategy from the ground up.
